'''Iann Doaba''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was one of the first colonists of [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]].

==Biography==
Among the colonists was also a woman named [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Cjaalysce]], with whom Doaba fell in love. In a fit of jealousy, he murdered a rival for her affections. He exiled himself into the desert (later known as the [[Doaba Badlands]]), enduring what was later called "the [[Long Walk]]."

Beal had a portrait painted of herself shortly afterward, in which her grief over Doaba was clearly visible. She then went into the desert in search of him, but [[Death/Legends|died]]. When Doaba found Beal's corpse, his body was consumed by his grief, leaving behind only his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Jedi apparel#Traditional robes|robes]].

Legend held that Doaba's guilty [[Force ghost/Legends|Force spirit]] attached itself to the portrait of Beal, called "[[Tejha Larel]]," [[Olys Corellisi/Legends|Old Corellian]] for "Undying Love." The father of [[Pret Swain]] discovered the portrait in the ruins not far from [[Cjaalysce'I]]. The elder Pret gave it to [[Benoni Ulte]], who claimed to have seen Doaba's spirit haunting the portrait in the form of a shadow.
